name: hff-payment-timing
description: HFF — Getting-Paid Speed Report: deterministic invoice CSV -> how fast clients pay once billed (per-client and overall median/mean/fastest/slowest days-to-pay, on-time vs late against each invoice's due basis, outstanding and oldest-open detail, monthly series, billed concentration) as an XLSX workbook + one-page PDF, plus a Stripe one-time checkout scaffold. Organizational tooling only, not advice.
